sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35909" key="e)noike/tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνοικ-έτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n35909.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she who inhabits,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐ. τῶν νήσων ἡ Ἀφροδίτη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
